pr.title: Non-record: LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + TrigramHash on PR414 stack (1.3762 bpb, 1xA100)

output.summary: Builds on PR414 by swapping ReLU^2 for LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 and trigram hashing triples into 8k buckets to enrich local context before attention.
techniques: LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 keeps MLP neurons active instead of dying like ReLU^2
Trigram hashing groups token triples into 8k buckets to inject richer local context prior to attention
